title: Document Processing Skill — Evaluation Cases
description: Positive (should-activate) and near-miss negative (should-NOT-activate) test cases for the document-processing agent skill trigger detection.

cases.input: Extract all text from this annual report PDF and save it to a text file. I need it for analysis.
cases.reason: User wants to extract text from a PDF for downstream use — a core PDF manipulation task.
assertions: pdfplumber selected over pypdf for layout-aware extraction
Output written to a new file, not overwriting source
Output file validated (non-empty, reasonable text content)

cases.input: Create a monthly sales report as a Word document. Include a summary paragraph, a table with Q1 revenue by region, and the company logo at the top.
cases.reason: User requests DOCX creation with specific structural elements — paragraph, table, image.
cases.workflow_path: DOCX Creation → Build from scratch with python-docx
assertions: Document contains heading, paragraph, table, and image

cases.input: Take this CSV of sales data, create an Excel workbook with formatted tables, a bar chart comparing regions, and a pivot table by product category.
cases.reason: User wants XLSX creation with formatting, charts, and pivot tables — full spreadsheet workflow.
cases.workflow_path: XLSX Handling → Create with openpyxl (charts, pivot, formatting)
assertions: CSV data ingested and written to XLSX
Pivot table created on separate sheet
Cell formatting applied (fonts, borders, number formats)

cases.input: I have meeting notes in markdown. Turn them into a 10-slide PowerPoint presentation with a title slide, bullet points from each section, and speaker notes.
cases.reason: User wants PPTX generation from structured content with speaker notes — full presentation workflow.
cases.workflow_path: PPTX Generation → Build from scratch or template-driven
assertions: 10 slides generated with correct layout types
Speaker notes populated on each slide

cases.input: Fill out this tax form PDF. Name: Alice Brown, Tax ID: IE1234567X, Year: 2025, Amount: €45,200. Save the filled copy.
cases.reason: User wants programmatic PDF form filling with specific field values.
cases.workflow_path: PDF Manipulation → Form filling with pypdf
assertions: PDF form fields detected via pypdf.get_fields()
Field values mapped to provided data
Filled form saved to new file (not overwriting template)

cases.input: Can you read this PDF and tell me what it says? I just want to know the main points.
cases.reason: User only wants content summarisation/reading, not document manipulation. This is a read/extract task, not a document-processing workflow.
cases.misleading_aspect: Mentions 'PDF' but the intent is information retrieval, not document creation, editing, or conversion.

cases.input: Edit this paragraph to make it more concise and fix the grammar errors.
cases.reason: General text editing — no document format manipulation, no file format operations. Pure natural language task.
cases.misleading_aspect: The word 'edit' could trigger document-editing workflows, but the context is prose editing, not document-format editing.

cases.input: Can you edit this photo to crop it, adjust the brightness, and remove the background?
cases.reason: Image editing request — the document-processing skill handles office documents, not raster image manipulation.
cases.misleading_aspect: Uses 'edit' and could appear document-adjacent (images in documents), but the core intent is image editing, not document processing.
